ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "show_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the show */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., Movie, Series) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the content */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Cast of the content */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the content */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the content was added to the platform */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the content was released */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the content */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the content */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season number (for series) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the content in minutes */,
  "production_company_id" TEXT /* ID of the production company responsible for the content */,
  "distributor_id" TEXT /* ID of the distributor responsible for the content */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the trailer of the content */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to the thumbnail image of the content */,
  "content_status" TEXT /* Status of the content (e.g., available, upcoming, removed) */,
  "content_language" TEXT /* Primary language of the content */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., movie, series) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_production_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_company_id") REFERENCES production_companies ("production_company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_rating FOREIGN KEY ("rating") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_cast FOREIGN KEY ("cast") REFERENCES casts ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES distributors ("distributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_director FOREIGN KEY ("director") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating */,
  "rating_description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs (e.g., Asia, Europe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "director_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "director_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the director's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casts" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "cast_name" TEXT /* Name of the cast member */,
  "cast_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the cast member */,
  "cast_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the cast member's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., viewer, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User's content preferences (e.g., action, comedy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the content */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the content (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the content was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_access_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., Dubbed, Subtitled) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the version */,
  "subtitle_language" TEXT /* Subtitle language (if applicable) */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "version_release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_versions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "production_company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "production_company_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the production company's logo */,
  "production_company_description" TEXT /* Description of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "distributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "distributor_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the distributor's logo */,
  "distributor_description" TEXT /* Description of the distributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference (e.g., action, comedy) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference (e.g., high, medium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
